name: Ladybird
description: Ladybirds wandering a sunny leaf — wing spots and headcaps shift with every redraw, a lucky yellow one in the mix.

code.style: --wing: @p(var(--color1), var(--color1), var(--color1), var(--color3)); --crawl: @rand(360deg); --rule: ( /* spots ride the shell via three shadows of one dot */ --sg: calc(@r(90, 130) * 1px / @Y); @random(${shapeFrequency}) { :before { content: ''; position: absolute; inset: 16%; border-radius: 50% 50% 46% 46%; background: var(--wing); box-shadow: inset 0 calc(110px / @Y) 0 var(--color2); transform: rotate(var(--crawl)); transition: ease 700ms; } :after { content: ''; position: absolute; @size: 9%; left: 38%; top: 42%; border-radius: 50%; background: var(--color2); box-shadow: @var(--sg) calc(@var(--sg) / 2) var(--color2), calc(@var(--sg) / 3) @var(--sg) var(--color2), calc(@var(--sg) * 0.9) calc(@var(--sg) * -0.4) var(--color2); transition: ease 700ms; } } );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
